弱.origin: Two bows 弓 weakened by frost — it means weak or fragile.

sentence.en: The little bird is still very weak.

弹.origin: A bow 弓 that shoots something out — a bullet or pellet.

sentence.en: There is a bullet in the gun.

录.origin: A brush used to write things down and record them.

彭.origin: The sound 彡 of a drum 壴 — often used as a family name.

役.origin: A person walking 彳 to do hard work — a servant or laborer.

彼.origin: Steps 彳 toward the other side — it means that or the other.

征.origin: To step 彳 out straight 正 on a journey — to set out or recruit.

sentence.en: The soldiers are setting out to battle.

径.origin: A small path you walk 彳 along.

sentence.en: There is a small path in the mountains.

待.origin: To wait 彳 at the gate to welcome a guest.

sentence.en: I am waiting for you at the door.

律.origin: To walk 彳 by the rules — it means law or rule.

sentence.en: He lives a very regular life.

徐.origin: To walk 彳 slowly and calmly; also a common family name.

徒.origin: To walk 走 in someone's footsteps 彳 — a student or follower.

循.origin: To walk 彳 step by step, following a path or rule.

微.origin: Something so small you can barely see it — tiny.

徽.origin: A small sign or badge worn to show a group — an emblem.

sentence.en: There is a national emblem on the wall.

忆.origin: The heart 忄 holding on to the past — to remember.

忌.origin: A heart 心 that minds too much — jealous or to avoid.

sentence.en: He is a little jealous of me.

忍.origin: A knife 刃 pressing on the heart 心 — to endure and bear it.

sentence.en: He holds back and does not cry.

忘.origin: When something is lost 亡 from the heart 心 — to forget.

sentence.en: I forgot to bring my book.

忠.origin: A heart 心 that is centered 中 and true — loyal.

sentence.en: The dog is very loyal to people.

忧.origin: A heart 忄 that is heavy and sad — worried.

sentence.en: There is some sadness on her face.

忽.origin: A heart 心 that does not 勿 notice — suddenly.

态.origin: How the heart 心 shows itself — one's manner or attitude.

怄.origin: A heart 忄 feeling cross and sulky — annoyed.

怒.origin: A heart 心 like a slave 奴 pushed too far — anger.

怔.origin: A heart 忄 frozen in place — startled or stunned.

sentence.en: He was stunned when he heard it.

思.origin: Using the mind and heart 心 together — to think.

sentence.en: I am thinking about a problem.

怨.origin: A heart 心 full of complaint — to blame or resent.

怪.origin: A heart 忄 that feels something is odd — strange.

怯.origin: A heart 忄 that wants to go 去 away — timid, afraid.

怵.origin: A heart 忄 that shrinks back — fearful.

sentence.en: I feel a little scared inside.

恋.origin: A heart 心 that keeps thinking of someone — love.

sentence.en: I am reluctant to leave this place.

恕.origin: To treat others as 如 your own heart 心 — to forgive.

恨.origin: A heart 忄 that stops 艮 and turns sour — to hate.

sentence.en: There is no hatred in his heart.

恩.origin: Kindness 心 that comes from 因 someone — a favor or grace.

息.origin: Breath passing through the nose 自 and heart 心 — to rest.

恰.origin: When the heart 忄 fits 合 just right — exactly.

sentence.en: You came at exactly the right time.

恶.origin: A heart 心 that is ugly inside — bad or evil.

sentence.en: There is a bad person in the story.

恼.origin: A heart 忄 in a muddle — angry and upset.

悉.origin: To sort out 釆 in the mind 心 until you know it well.

sentence.en: I am very familiar with this road.

悔.origin: A heart 忄 that wishes it had not — to regret.

悟.origin: The mind 忄 suddenly understands — to realize.

患.origin: Trouble strung 串 through the heart 心 — suffering or illness.

sentence.en: There are many patients in the hospital.

您.origin: You 你 spoken from the heart 心 — a polite way to say 'you'.

悬.origin: Something hanging 心 in the air, not settled — to hang or suspend.

sentence.en: A painting hangs on the wall.

情.origin: The clear 青 feelings of the heart 忄 — emotion.

sentence.en: I am in a good mood today.

惠.origin: A kind heart 心 that gives — favor and benefit.

惦.origin: The mind 忄 keeps a shop 店 of worries — to think of and miss.

惧.origin: A heart 忄 that is afraid — to fear.

惨.origin: A heart 忄 in deep pain — miserable.
